'''Baramorra''' was a temperate, dreary, rainsoaked [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] governed by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Llon Banjeer]]'s nephew, [[Boss Banjeer|the "Boss"]]. He employed [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] such as [[Jahnar-Kooda]] to keep the populace in line; when the planet's elders objected, he had them killed. The Boss was funded by [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]; when this was revealed, the Boss was executed as a traitor by [[Kir Kanos]].

{{Planet-stub}}
